payload.answer: Stored a partial memory: fetch failure for the URL and the user's stated intent to remember it for memory architecture, without claiming article contents.

entity_resolution.reason: The only reliable entity is the URL; no stable entity id is provided.

payload.intent: Record user request and fetch failure for a specific article URL without asserting article contents.

memory_cards.statement: An attempt to fetch https://example.com/missing resulted in a 404 network error.
The user indicated the (unretrieved) article at https://example.com/missing is useful for memory architecture; the article contents were not available due to the fetch failure.

details: Persisted fetch outcome (404 network error) and user intent; avoided asserting article contents.

repair_options: Re-try fetching the URL later to obtain the article content.
Ask the user to provide the article text or a working mirror/link.
Store a placeholder note that content is pending until retrieval succeeds.
